title: validating_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the validating room: full-environment validation (build, deploy, end-to-end script).

outcome.description: pass → advance to done; fail_short → minor patch needed; fail → return to proposing; infra_error → environment, not the fix.

next_action_hint.description: Free-text hint about what should change next; consumed by proposing/implementing on retry.
